method.description: HTTP method (GET, POST, etc.) or special signal type (EMPTY, CAPS, ROUTE).

observed_at.description: Timestamp when the request was observed (ISO 8601).

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the request event (may equal observed_at).

resource.description: Requested resource (e.g., '/', '/robots.txt', or 'line' for signal probes).

result.description: Numeric result code (e.g., HTTP status, or 400 for error signals).

sequence.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number for the run.
